expectations.text: Uses the prior conversation as context instead of restarting requirement discovery from scratch
expectations.evidence: It clearly continues from the existing approval-center context and says '那我先做最后一轮收口'.

expectations.text: Provides a pre-generation review that separates confirmed points from unresolved or risky items
expectations.evidence: Despite calling it '最后一轮收口', it does not summarize confirmed items first; it directly asks six new operational questions.

expectations.text: Asks explicitly whether to begin final downstream-prompt generation instead of generating immediately after '差不多了'
expectations.evidence: It says '你回我这一组后，我就可以帮你判断是不是已经足够进入下一步了', which keeps clarification going rather than asking for permission to begin generation now.

eval_feedback.overall: The new late-stage rule did not generalize here yet. The model recognizes the cue but still converts review mode into one more bundled clarification round.
